summary: E2E testing of Social Comment Reply Manager. 13/13 backend API tests passed via pytest. All critical frontend flows verified via Playwright: sidebar platforms & accounts, stats, comment cards, approve/edit/skip buttons, account filter, show-all, approve-all, thread history toggle. All flows working correctly.

issues: Cabinet Grotesk font from fonts.cdnfonts.com fails to decode (OTS parsing error: invalid sfntVersion). Falls back to Manrope, visually fine but generates console warnings on every render. Consider hosting font locally or switching to a working CDN (e.g., Fontshare).

action_items: (Optional/minor) Replace Cabinet Grotesk font source to stop repeated font-decode console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~720 lines with all routes + models + seed data inline. Consider splitting into routers/ (accounts, comments, platforms) and a separate seed module for maintainability.
Demo data seed hard-coded inside server.py (~220 lines). Extract to a seed script or JSON fixture.

/api/comments/fetch, /approve, /approve-all catch all exceptions per-account and continue silently (only logs). Fine for demo but in production the per-account error should be surfaced back in the response (done for /fetch, not for /approve-all).

Regenerate endpoint returns 200 even when Groq API key is missing — good fallback, but response doesn't indicate it's a placeholder. Consider adding an ai_generated: false flag so UI can notify the user.
All backend routes correctly exclude MongoDB _id via projection — good.
Pydantic models correctly configured with extra='ignore'. Good.
CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers reject this combination. Not impacting current functionality since no cookies are sent, but should be tightened.
test_credentials: none required (no auth; demo data auto-seeded)
seed_data_creation: Used existing /api/seed-demo endpoint. Reset via /api/reset-demo before frontend run to restore full 8 comments / 4 accounts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo data is idempotent — POST /api/seed-demo returns {seeded: false} if already present. To reset: DELETE /api/reset-demo then POST /api/seed-demo. Groq and OAuth are not configured: regenerate returns a placeholder draft (still 200), and /api/accounts/{platform}/auth-url returns 400 with 'credentials not configured'. All 8 demo comments have hardcoded AI drafts; one comment (Sarah K. thread reply on YouTube) has thread_history with 2 messages for testing the toggle-thread-btn.
